skills.name: citations-grounding
skills.proposed_description: Use when responses require citations, source grounding, quote handling, evidence checks, or clear separation between sourced facts and analysis.
should_trigger: Answer questions from these uploaded PDFs and cite the source for each claim.
Use the knowledge base to summarize the refund policy with citations.
Quote the exact paragraph that supports this conclusion.
should_not_trigger: Brainstorm five tagline ideas without sources.
Rewrite this paragraph for tone only.

skills.name: compliance-privacy
skills.proposed_description: Use when content may include PII, PHI, student, financial, or regulated data; supports minimization, redaction, safe exports, and privacy review.
should_trigger: Redact patient names and MRNs from this report before sharing.
Review this student data export for FERPA/privacy issues.
Summarize this HR file without exposing personal details.
should_not_trigger: Summarize this public company press release.
Create a generic privacy policy outline with no user data.

skills.name: web-research
skills.proposed_description: Use when current or externally verifiable facts are needed, including latest events, prices, products, people, policies, or source-backed research.
should_trigger: Look up the latest pricing for this product and cite sources.
Find recent policy changes affecting this topic.
Verify this factual claim against current public sources.
should_not_trigger: Summarize only the uploaded file without using the internet.
Write a fictional story about a researcher.

acceptance_criteria: Skill names and file paths are preserved.
Index entries are reviewed before direct metadata edits.
No secrets or private regulated data are introduced.
